basic_details.job_title: RECPDCL Senior Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The REC Power Development and Consultancy (RECPDCL) has officially announced the Senior Executive (Tech.)- Lead Verifier/L5 Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification was published on its official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 48 years and hold an Engineering Graduate (B.E./B.Tech) or equivalent, B.Sc or equivalent qualification along with Accredited Energy Auditor by BEE and Lead Verifier certification for ISO 14064-1/2/3 can now submit their online applications before 21 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shar

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 48 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC-NCL, and 10 years for PwBD (in addition to SC/ST/OBC-NCL).

qualification.education_qualification: Engineering Graduate (B.E./B.Tech) or equivalent (Or) (B.Sc) or equivalent, Accredited Energy Auditor by BEE, Lead Verifier certification for ISO 14064-1/2/3
qualification.details: Senior Executive (Tech.)- Lead Verifier/L5 (Compliance Mechanism): As per The Bureau of Energy Efficiency (Qualification for Accredited Energy Auditors and Maintenance of the List) Regulations, 2010. Senior Executive (Tech.)- Lead Verifier/L5 (Offset Mechanism): Engineering Graduate (Bachelor of Engineering /Bachelor of Technology) or equivalent (Or) (Bachelor of Science) or equivalent. Common Qualification: Accredited Energy Auditor by the Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE), Lead Verifier certification for ISO 14064-1/2/3.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RECPDCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RECPDCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.rec_power_development_and_consultancy_re: Engineering Graduate (B.E./B.Tech) or equivalent (Or) (B.Sc) or equivalent, Accredited Energy Auditor by BEE, Lead Verifier certification for ISO 14064-1/2/3

content_sections.heading: RECPDCL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RECPDCL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RECPDCL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RECPDCL Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Executive (Tech.)- Lead Verifier/L5 (Compliance Mechanism): As per The Bureau of Energy Efficiency (Qualification for Accredited Energy Auditors and Maintenance of the List) Regulations, 2010. Senior Executive (Tech.)- Lead Verifier/L5 (Offset Mechanism): Engineering Graduate (Bachelor of Engineering /Bachelor of Technology) or equivalent (Or) (Bachelor of Science) or equivalent. Common Qualification: Accredited Energy Auditor by the Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE), Lead Verifier certification for ISO 14064-1/2/3.

content_sections.heading: RECPDCL Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 48 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC-NCL, and 10 years for PwBD (in addition to SC/ST/OBC-NCL).

rows.event: Commencement of Online Submission of Applications
Closing of Online Submission of Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RECPDCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RECPDCL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RECPDCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the RECPDCL Senior Executive posts is 21st July 2026. Ensure you submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Senior Executive posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Executive (Tech.)- Lead Verifier/L5 posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 135000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Engineering Graduates (B.E./B.Tech) or equivalent (Or) Bachelor of Science or equivalent, and also be an Accredited Energy Auditor by BEE and hold a Lead Verifier certification for ISO 14064-1/2/3.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 48 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in this RECPDCL recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Senior Executive (Tech.)- Lead Verifier/L5 posts in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for RECPDCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Executive posts will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: The job type mentioned in the notification is 'Contract', indicating that these positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is advised to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Gurugram, Haryana.
